contract_violations.message: the 'monkeypatch' fixture can replace program behavior and is not allowed
call to monkeypatch.setattr can replace program behavior and is not allowed
setattr() targets the module under test or an object reachable from it
the 'monkeypatch' fixture can replace program behavior and is not allowed

generated_test.source:
import gradebook.analytics as analytics

def test_percentile_without_its_clamp(monkeypatch):
    monkeypatch.setattr(analytics, 'clamp_percent', float)
    assert analytics.percentile([10, 20, 30, 40], -12.5) == 10
generated_test.targeted_behavior: intentionally invalid attempt that replaces the program clamp
